case_title: 1860 WASHINGTON STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION VS. TITO'S LANDSCAPING AND MAINTENANCE, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-22-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-22-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF 1860 WASHINGTON STREET HOME OWNERS ASSOCIATION IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT TITO'S LANDSCAPING AND MAINTENCE INC. IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS INFORMED OF THE PROOF OF SERVICE ISSUES: THE ADDRESS AND TITLE ON THE PROOF OF SERVICE WAS DIFFERENT THAN THE WHAT WAS LISTED WITH THE CAL SEC OF STATE. PLAINTIFF PROVIED DOCUMENTATTION SUPPORTING THE INFORMATION ON THE PROOF OF SERVICE. HONORABLE A. JAMES ROBERTSON ALLOWED THE CASE TO BE HEARD. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-22-2019 - JUDGMENT.
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF 1860 WASHINGTON STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10/25/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: ROGERS, NICHOLAS A. SUBSTITUTED FOR PRO PER AS ATTORNEY FOR 1860 WASHINGTON STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY 1860 WASHINGTON STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT TITO'S LANDSCAPING AND MAINTENANCE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-22-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF 1860 WASHINGTON STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TITO'S LANDSCAPING AND MAINTENANCE, INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $175.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,175.00, COSTS REDUCED DUE TO EXCESSIVE SERVICE AMOUNT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $150.00 - SERVED SEP-21-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT TITO'S LANDSCAPING AND MAINTENANCE, INC.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1860 WASHINGTON STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT TITO'S LANDSCAPING AND MAINTENANCE, INC.
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY ATTORNEY ROGERS, NICHOLAS A.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF 1860 WASHINGTON STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION
